sentences.translation: Majka je kupila banane, grožđe i nar.
sentences.translationEn: The mother bought bananas, grapes, and pomegranate.

sentences.arabic: قَطَّعَتِ الْفَوَاكِهَ وَوَضَعَتْهَا فِي طَبَقٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Isrekla je voće i stavila ga u jedan tanjir.
sentences.translationEn: She cut the fruits and placed them in one dish.

sentences.translation: Donijela je tanjir gostima uz čaj.
sentences.translationEn: She offered the dish to the guests with tea.

sentences.translation: Gosti su pohvalili lijep domaćinski prijem.
sentences.translationEn: The guests praised the generous hospitality.
